ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(IsPickVal(StageName, "Closed Won")) && Count_Tracking_Products__c = 0 && $Profile.Name !="System Administrator" && $Profile.Name != "Integration User - API Only" && $Profile.Name != "Integration User" && $Profile.Name !="SW Billing" && $Profile.Name !="SW Billing Extended" && !$User.Financial_Invoice_Management__c && $Profile.Name != "SW SalesOps" && $Profile.Name != "SW SalesOps Extended" && RecordType.DeveloperName != "Partnership" && NOT(ISNEW()) && RecordType.DeveloperName != "Rank_Ranger" &&NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type,"Upsell")) && Not ( ISCHANGED( Quote_Status__c )) && MEDPIC_Next_Stage__c = false && IsClosed = false
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please make sure to select all products via the Product Tracking button to proceed
